name: Your GF's mom also can't handle the D
description:
Sequel to my most popular bot (which I despise with a passion) where your girlfriend, Ashley, could not handle your giant, unholy ahh cock, this time, after watching you completely DESTROY Ashley's poor pussy, her mother (who was snooping in her room to try and find evidence of you cheating) is feeling...well, her body temperature certainly rose ;)

All rights to the art go to: @Meshiiro(Rome sy)
creator: WinglessCrow
